name: Dutch Oven -- Nine Mile Stew
recipeIngredient: enough zucchini - sliced for one layer
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat enough oil in the oven to cover the bottom.
2. Sear the meat until browned.
3. Add the stew seasoning and stir.
4. Add onions and cook for 20-30 minutes (12 coals on the bottom and 6 on top).
5. Layer from bottom to top:
- potatoes
- carrots
- celery
- green peppers
- zucchini
6. Cook until vegetables are done but still crispy (7-8 coals on top), about 15 minutes.
7. Add the sausage on top and cook for an additional 15 minutes.
8. Sprinkle the cheddar cheese over the top and continue cooking until melted.
This is not a precise recipe. Feel free to adjust ingredients and amounts to suit your taste preferences, ensuring that vegetables requiring more cooking time are placed lower in the layers. Avoid adding liquid as the vegetables and meat will provide enough moisture.
